description: This file contains a helper class for managing an SQLite database, including schema initialization, data insertion, updating, and retrieval functions. It defines data classes and functions related to database configuration and singleton management for database access.

classes.name: SQLiteConfig
classes.description: Configuration data class for SQLite database, holding the database path.

classes.name: SQLiteDB
classes.description: Encapsulates SQLite database operations including schema initialization, data insertion, updates, and fetching.

methods.name: str _utc_now_iso()
methods.description: Returns the current UTC time as an ISO 8601 formatted string.

methods.name: SQLiteConfig.__init__
methods.description: Initializes SQLiteConfig with the database path.

methods.name: SQLiteDB.__init__
methods.description: Initializes the SQLiteDB instance and sets up the schema.

methods.name: SQLiteDB._connect
methods.description: Creates and returns a new SQLite connection with row factory set.

methods.name: SQLiteDB._init_schema
methods.description: Creates tables if they do not exist, defining database schema for runs and uploads.

methods.name: SQLiteDB.insert_placeholder_upload
methods.description: Inserts a new placeholder upload record into the database.

methods.name: SQLiteDB.insert_run
methods.description: Inserts a new run record into the database with JSON payload fields.

methods.name: SQLiteDB.update_run_status
methods.description: Updates the status and the timestamp of a specific run.

methods.name: SQLiteDB.update_run_error
methods.description: Updates the error message of a specific run.

methods.name: SQLiteDB.update_run_result_json
methods.description: Updates one of the JSON payload fields for a specific run; supports 'matching_json', 'gap_analysis_json', 'generated_pmd_json'.

methods.name: SQLiteDB.fetch_run
methods.description: Fetches and returns a run record by run_id.

methods.name: SQLiteDB.list_runs
methods.description: Returns a list of run records with limit and offset for pagination.

methods.name: __init__(self, config: SQLiteConfig)
methods.description: unavailable

methods.name: sqlite3.Connection _connect(self)
methods.description: unavailable

methods.name: None _init_schema(self)
methods.description: unavailable

methods.name: SQLiteConfig _resolve_config()
methods.description: unavailable

methods.name: Optional[Dict[str,Any]] fetch_run(self, run_id: str)
methods.description: unavailable

methods.name: SQLiteDB get_db()
methods.description: unavailable

methods.name: str insert_placeholder_upload( self, filename: str, content_type: Optional[str], notes: Optional[str] )
methods.description: unavailable

methods.name: None insert_run( self, *, run_id: str, status: str, template: Any, inventory: Any, metadata: Dict[str, Any], )
methods.description: unavailable

methods.name: list[Dict[str,Any]] list_runs(self, *, limit: int, offset: int)
methods.description: unavailable

methods.name: None update_run_error(self, run_id: str, error: str)
methods.description: unavailable

methods.name: None update_run_result_json(self, run_id: str, *, field: str, value: Any)
methods.description: unavailable

methods.name: None update_run_status(self, run_id: str, status: str)
methods.description: unavailable

ctags.name: fetch_run
ctags.pattern: /^    def fetch_run(self, run_id: str) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:$/

ctags.name: insert_placeholder_upload
ctags.signature: ( self, filename: str, content_type: Optional[str], notes: Optional[str] )

ctags.name: insert_run
ctags.signature: ( self, *, run_id: str, status: str, template: Any, inventory: Any, metadata: Dict[str, Any], )

ctags.name: list_runs
ctags.pattern: /^    def list_runs(self, *, limit: int, offset: int) -> list[Dict[str, Any]]:$/

ctags.pattern: /^    def update_run_error(self, run_id: str, error: str) -> None:$/
